topic: 面向VLA模型的持续时序场景空间对齐方法
topic_en: Persistent Temporal Scene-Spatial Alignment for VLA Models
topic_brief: Move VLA grounding from single-frame region-level alignment to temporally-consistent scene-level entity tracking; use that consistency to detect and correct execution-time errors in long-horizon, multi-stage, dynamic manipulation.

ideation.key_finding: Gap: persistent scene-entity rep used as VLA grounding + consistency residual as intrinsic error signal — combination not yet covered.

coding.smoke_status: pending_gpu_env (torch not installed locally — gate per blueprint §9 to be run on GPU box)

smoke_runs_completed.what: synthetic e2e: OpenVLA-7B inference + PSSA stub backward
real LIBERO sim: OpenVLA generalist on libero_spatial:0
smoke_runs_completed.result: 0/5 SR (expected — no LIBERO finetune), 190 ms/step, sim+render+inference no leaks

smoke_runs_completed.what: real LIBERO sim: OpenVLA-7B-finetuned-libero-spatial on libero_spatial:0
smoke_runs_completed.result: 5/5 SR (100%), mean 83 steps to success, 195 ms/step
fixes_required: --libero-image-fix: rgb[::-1,::-1] 180° rotate to match LIBERO finetune training distribution

phase1_sweep.wallclock: Spatial 4h17m, Object+Goal 6h (dual A800 with isolation), LONG ~16h
phase1_sweep.scope: 10 tasks × 50 rollouts × 4 suites (Spatial, Object, Goal, LONG) with OpenVLA-7B-finetuned ckpts

libero_long.status: complete — task 8+9 re-run after old A800 crash

phase1_sweep.vs_openvla_paper: 80.2% (ours, single seed) vs 84.7% (paper) — 4.5pp gap, within transformers-version replication variance

v1_failed_run.reason: fd leak in robosuite: each new OffScreenRenderEnv leaked EGL contexts; crashed at task 0 rollout 10
v1_failed_run.fix: hoist env outside rollout loop + ulimit -n 65536

system_state.version_pins: transformers==4.45.2, timm==0.9.16, tokenizers==0.20.3, robosuite==1.4.0, bddl==1.0.1, mujoco==3.1.6
network_workarounds: git config insteadOf https://gh-proxy.com/https://github.com/ (GitHub clone throttled)

remaining_after_phase1: Phase 2: implement PSSA action-head training pipeline (~300 lines code, no GPU)
Phase 2: train PSSA on libero_spatial (~6-12 GPU-hr, ¥50-100)

phase2_v1.1.wallclock: training ~80 min/run x2 + eval ~28 min/run x2
phase2_v1.1.architecture: v1.1 bypasses OpenVLA DinoSigLIP vision_backbone — feeds [text_embeds | PSE_tokens] only to LLM, with continuous-MLP action head
phase2_v1.1.key_finding: v1.1 fails to drive any successful rollouts; XTC ablation collapses because L_xtc<5e-5 (numerical floor) due to vision bypass — XTC loss is dead in v1.1, contribution to total loss < 0.003%
phase2_v1.1.implication: Need v2 with proper DinoSigLIP vision integration for XTC to fire meaningfully. v1.1 validates pipeline (LoRA + PSE-Tok + action head all train) but not policy quality.

figure_gen.scope: framework figure only; quantitative figures blocked until Phase 2

writing.todo_markers: Experiments §5.2-5.5 + abstract numbers; tied to EXECUTION

five_bugs_fixed_in_v2c: sequence layout backwards (v2c-r1: text|image|PSE → r2: BOS|image|text|PSE)
action vocab boundary off by pad_to_multiple_of (32064 vs 32000)
DDP LR schedule doubled (T_max * num_processes fix)
LIBERO {-1,+1} vs OpenVLA [0,1] gripper convention (root cause of 0% trained)

gate3_first_trained_run.config: variant_A (PSE after_image), n_entities=8, lr=2e-4, 3000 steps, bs=4 effective
gate3_first_trained_run.interpretation: training drifted from OpenVLA's good policy (80% untrained → 22% trained); lr too high

in_progress.hypothesis: preserve OpenVLA baseline by minimizing PSE+LoRA perturbation

checkpoints.phase2_scope: implement PSSA action head training (PSE-Tok + XTC-Loss + CRED) on top of frozen OpenVLA backbone, train on LIBERO demo data
checkpoints.phase2_v1.1_done: Training pipeline validated end-to-end. Both baseline (lambda_xtc=0.1) and ablation (lambda_xtc=0) hit 0/100 Spatial SR. XTC loss < 5e-5 throughout — needs v2 vision path to fire.
checkpoints.phase2_v2_scope: integrate OpenVLA's DinoSigLIP image preprocessor in training_step + reuse OpenVLA's native discrete action token decoder (keep continuous-MLP head as alt path)
checkpoints.headroom_to_beat: 80.2% suite-level SR on libero_spatial with the exact same 10×50 protocol

notes: User-provided motivation: existing VLA models only do per-frame visual grounding; proposed method introduces cross-time-consistent scene entity representation to track objects + spatial relations, enabling long-horizon stability and execution-time error correction via consistency.
